title: AFGE RIF Shield Demo
description:
AFGE RIF Shield - Project Description
Solidarity Innovation Group presents AFGE RIF Shield - the first union-built mobile app protecting federal employees from 2026 OPM forced distribution ratings and RIFs.
The Problem: New OPM rules cap Level 3+ ratings at 40% agency-wide. Ratings = #1 RIF retention factor. Members without daily evidence get ranked last.
The Solution: Phone app members install → 30-second daily accomplishment logs → 52 weeks of manager-ready proof → Level 4 rating → RIF protection.
Core Features:
	•	Live Rating Calculator: “72/100 → Level 4 needs +13pts”
	•	Daily Journal: Task + impact dropdown → auto-tags to rating factors
	•	Training Roadmap: “FAC-COR Level I → +12pts” with direct course links
	•	PDF Reports: One-tap “Manager Review Packet” for performance reviews
2026 Rating Metrics: Experience(30pts), Performance(25), Training(20), Results(15), Teamwork(10) Levels: L5(90+), L4(80-89), L3(70-79)
Technical: Flutter PWA (iPhone/Android home screen install), localStorage (FedRAMP-ready), AFGE blue/gold colors.
Business Model: Free core app → Pro upgrade ($4.99) = RIF simulator + cloud sync. 10K downloads × 20% Pro = $50K revenue Year 1.
Demo Goal: Show leadership complete app on YOUR iPhone → Benefits page deployment → AFGE member launch.
PASTE THIS INSTRUCTION INTO AGENT ZERO
instructions:
Build Flutter PWA "AFGE RIF Shield" by Solidarity Innovation Group for GitHub repo solidarity-rif-shield.

DEMO VERSION - Full free functionality.

SCREENS:
DASHBOARD: Live rating "72/100 → Level 4 needs +13pts" + progress bars + "Log Today" 
JOURNAL: Daily accomplishments (Task + Impact dropdown + Hours) → weekly summary chart
TRAINING: Gap analysis → "FAC-COR Level I → +12pts" → course links
REPORTS: One-tap PDF "Manager Review Packet" 

2026 RATING METRICS:
Experience:30pts, Performance:25pts, Training:20pts, Results:15pts, Teamwork:10pts
Level 5:90-100, Level 4:80-89, Level 3:70-79

TECH:
Flutter web → PWA (iPhone "Add to Home Screen")
localStorage only (offline-first)
AFGE colors: Blue #003087, Gold #FDB813
Professional HR dashboard design (NEOGOV-style)

CRITICAL: Push complete Flutter project to GitHub repo solidarity-rif-shield
OUTPUT: 
1. Flutter project folder committed to repo
2. Render.com deploy instructions
3. iPhone PWA install guide
4. Benefits page iframe embed code

Federal security compliant. Leadership demo-ready.

file_structure.gitignore:

venv/**
**/__pycache__/**
